title: Different Ways to Evaluate a Boolean Expression

content.problemStatement:
Given an expression, A, with operands and operators (OR, AND, XOR), in how many
    ways can you evaluate the expression to be true, by grouping it in different ways?.
content.inputFormat: A string representing a boolean expression with operands (T or F) and operators (&, |, ^)
content.outputFormat: The number of ways to evaluate the expression to be true

solution.approach: Divide the expression into subexpressions and calculate the number of ways to make each subexpression true or false
